options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: champions
options.description: Which champions are possibly included in the item pool?

options.name: starting_champions
options.description: Number of champions in your starting inventory

options.name: champion_subset_count
options.description:
Number of champions to randomly select for the item pool of those listed provided.
Higher then the total number of champions will just use all champions listed.

options.name: enabled_checks
options.description:
Which check types are active for each champion?
All check types are enabled by default: "Dragon", "Herald", "Baron", "Tower", "Inhibitor", 
"Game Win", "Assists", "Kills", "Creep Score", "Vision Score"
To recreate the old ARAM mode, use: "Tower", "Inhibitor", "Game Win", "Assists", "Kills"

options.name: support_special_treatment
options.description:
When enabled, support-role champions will not receive Kill and Creep Score checks,
and Vision Score checks will only apply to support champions.
(This was enabled by default on version <=0.2.0)
Disable this to give all champions identical checks.

options.name: win_completes_champion
options.description:
If enabled, winning a game with a champion (Enemy Nexus Destroyed check) will
automatically complete all remaining checks for that champion.

options.name: required_creep_score
options.description: Required CS to complete CS checks

options.name: required_vision_score
options.description: Required VS to complete VS checks

options.name: required_kills
options.description: Required Kills to complete Kill checks

options.name: required_assists
options.description: Required Assists to complete Assist checks

options.name: total_lp_count
options.description: Total LP items to place in the world.

options.name: required_lp
options.description: What percentage of total LP available do you need to collect to win?

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
